description: Welcome your new subscribers in style with this charming email template, perfect for e-commerce, fashion, and transactional interactions. Express your gratitude and make your new customers feel valued right from the start. The template is designed to offer a warm welcome, coupled with the excitement of a sale or a discount. It includes a spot for a coupon code or a special gift, adding an extra touch of appreciation for their sign-up. This template perfectly blends thank you with a sense of anticipation for the shopping journey ahead. It’s more than just a welcome, it's the beginning of a delightful customer experience.
short_description: Welcome new subscribers with this email template, ideal for e-commerce & fashion sectors. Express gratitude while offering a sale, discount or coupon code, enhancing the customer experience from the start. More than a thank you, it's a delightful shopping journey's beginning.

designer.description: Hi! My name is Martin. I’m a web / user interface designer located in Bulgaria, Europe. Since the past 10 years I’ve worked on a variety of projects for small, medium and large companies. I enjoy doing pixel perfect designs with attention to every detail.
